title: Annotation
description: Clarifai Annotation schema - represents an annotation on an input

input_id.title: ID of the input this annotation is tied to

data.description: The data passed along in this annotation.

annotation_info.title: task_id is deprecated in annotation_info. Use task_id

created_at.title:
When the annotation was created. We follow the XXXX timestamp
format. We use https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt format:
"2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z" so you can expect results like
the following from the API:
"2017-04-11T21:50:50.223962Z"

trusted.title:
Whether or not this annotation is trusted
Will be deprecated

input_level.description: Is this the input level annotation.

consensus_info.title:
Consensus review related information, e.g.
* annotation group
* id of annotation parent, in case the annotation was split from another annotation

task_id.title: The id of the task annotation belongs to

worker.description: Worker is the worker that created the annotation.
